response: The iPhone 15 Pro is a premium smartphone featuring a 6.1-inch OLED display powered by the advanced A17 Pro chip, with a impressive 48MP main camera and 3274mAh battery capacity. Available in storage options ranging from 128GB to 1TB, this 187g device is priced at $999 and has earned an excellent rating of 4.6 out of 5 stars from users.
